_codex_staging.notes: Amazon transcript source research deposit for FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026. Official search in prior handover found no accepted written transcript; StockAnalysis provides readable speaker-by-speaker transcript pages for all in-scope fiscal quarters.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.
